# Rescue Packet

<!-- READ-ONLY TEMPLATE. Do NOT edit this file during a task. -->
<!-- The rescue phase READS this schema and EMITS a filled copy in its response. -->
<!-- Use after repeated failure or implementation drift. -->
<!-- Do not continue patching blindly. Stop and think. -->

Task ID: <!-- must match the original task -->
What was attempted: <!-- max 3 sentences -->
What failed: <!-- observable symptoms, not guesses -->
Observed evidence: <!-- logs, error messages, test output — paste actual data -->
Assumptions likely wrong: <!-- list each with confidence: high | medium | low -->
Scope to re-open: <!-- what part of the plan needs rethinking -->
Safer fallback: <!-- simplest thing that could still work -->
Next narrow experiment: <!-- one small, testable step to validate or invalidate an assumption -->
Escalate to review model?: <!-- yes | no — with reason; check .ai/models.yaml for which model is assigned to `review` -->
